posts.author: DanielAdek (Daniel Adekunle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Devs,

We notice that when we convert a subitem to item and vice versa, there is no event for this that suits our need.

Our observation
we convert subitem to item (then automation: item move to group was triggered)
We converted item to subitem (then automation: column changes was triggered)

Our request: For both actions can we have events: like (item convert to subitem) / (subitem convert to item) to handle this operation?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @DanielAdek and welcome to the community!

Thank you for your request!

Everyone: You can vote for this at the top left corner of the screen
